title: VanillaBackport: Mob Variants Compat
description: Compatibility for Biome We've Gone, Terralith, Nature's Spirit & Biomes O' Plenty For VanillaBackport 1.1.5+ Mob Variants
body:
(Formerly Called VanillaBackport: Terralith & BWG Compat)

Adds full Terralith and Biomes We’ve Gone, Nature's Spirit And Biomes'O Plenty support for pigs, cows, chickens, and wolves, making these variants work in these modded biomes

If you need regionsunexplored biomes, i would suggest checking out
[RU Wolves Compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vb-x-ru)

Also if you want leaf litter, fallen trees, wildflowers generation, and camels and armadillos spawning in modded biomes, and natures, and warm/cold variants i would suggest [Vanilla Backport Compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vb-compat)

Special Thanks to [Vykket](https://modrinth.com/user/Vykket), [Fyoncle](https://modrinth.com/user/Fyoncle) and [Blackgear](https://modrinth.com/user/ItsBlackgear) for making this datapack/mod possible
